title: COMMUNITY FACILITY - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY PORTLAND METRO COMMUNITY FACILITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers recreational activities such as a basketball program, weight room, youth groups, Bible study, and other youth-focused programs. 5325 N Williams Avenue Portland, OR 97217 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 4:30pm-8:30pm, Saturday 5pm-11pm, 1st and 3rd Sunday of the month 4:30pm-6:30pm Email (971) 340-4010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 340-4010 Main phone Main phone (971) 340-4010 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Application required for some programs. FEES: $55 per visit. $30 monthly membership available. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland (Multnomah County only) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 72 and 44. On the corner of N Moore Avenue and N Killingsworth Street. Services: Neighborhood Multipurpose Centers Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - MOORE STREET SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY PORTLAND METRO
